Maximum scaled inner product

maxprod.Rd

Compute the maximum scaled |X'r| / m(j) across all variables, treating variables with m(j) == 0 as excluded from the maximum. Used for selecting the maximum lambda in penalized regression with individual-level data.

Usage

maxprod(X, r, n, p, m)

Arguments

X

An n x p numeric matrix.

r

A numeric vector of length n.

n

An integer specifying the number of rows.

p

An integer specifying the number of columns.

m

A numeric vector of per-variable scaling factors (length p). Variables with m(j) == 0 are skipped.

Value

A numeric scalar: the maximum value of |X'r|(j) / m(j).

On this page
